business.name: Above All Garage Doors, LLC
business.tagline: When your garage door won't budge, we make it move

hero.headline: Montgomery's garage door *problem solvers*
hero.subheadline: Brian and his team fix what others mess up — from broken springs to bad installs.

services_section.label: THE FIX
services_section.heading: Every garage door problem has a solution
services_section.subheading: From springs to openers to complete installs

services.title: Spring Replacement
services.description: Broken spring? We carry the right size and install it properly the first time.

services.title: Opener Repair
services.description: Motor issues, remote problems, or safety sensor fixes — we handle all opener brands.

services.title: Door Installation
services.description: New garage doors installed right, from residential homes to boat dry-docks.

services.title: Track & Hardware
services.description: Bent tracks, worn rollers, and loose hardware repaired or replaced.

services.title: Tune-Up Service
services.description: Complete system check to prevent problems before they happen.

about.heading: Montgomery garage door repair that actually works
about.body: We're the Montgomery team that fixes what others mess up. Real techs, fair pricing, and we stand behind our work.

reviews.name: Louis H.
reviews.text: Brian is the best and very knowledgeable. He fixed the bad installation we'd been living with and got our system working perfectly.

reviews.name: thomas j.
reviews.text: Brian was punctual, polite, fast, and very affordable. Installed two struts and tuned up my door. Saved me lots of money.

reviews.name: Nancy T.
reviews.text: Great to work with! They did what they said and corrected an error with no hassles. Finding companies with this ethic is rare.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Montgomery and surrounding areas
service_areas.subheading: Local garage door repair across central Alabama

cta.heading: Garage door stuck? We'll get it moving.
cta.body: Free quotes on all repairs and installations. Call Brian's team for honest pricing and solid work.
